description: Phase 1 protected-path baseline. git blob SHA-1 (git hash-object) per file at the committed HEAD when the daily integrity check was set up. The 7am check compares these against the current GitHub HEAD of each repo. Any change = drift to flag.
note_revision: Updated 2026-06-11 post issues #4/#5 merge. fortress-ai main=1ff2380 (fix-issue-5 merged: bounded tighten-only revert knobs; protected blobs UNCHANGED — perf_monitor.py & registries are not protected). trading-bot master=8c9836d (fix-issue-4 merged: bracket-unavailable -> SI-HOLD, no naked order; protected blobs UNCHANGED — orchestrator.py & alpaca_execution.py are not protected). master is the GitHub DEFAULT branch. Phases 1+2+3 and issues #1-#5 all verified clean + merged.

fortress-ai.head: 1ff23800d120c9f25bde3c2fcc6ab1a053b19e04
fortress-ai.note: fortress-ai has no risk_guardian.py; risk caps live in utils/pre_trade_gate.py (FORTRESS_MAX_ORDER_*).

trading-bot.head: 8c9836dd9718eb7c370cbe0791c6a5278b027546
trading-bot.note: trading-bot has no si_code_implementation.py (self-coder is fortress-only). master is canonical AND is now the GitHub default branch (reconciled 2026-06-11). The old main is retained but no longer default.
